# ifx-error-page



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property          | Attribute          | Description                                                                              | Type                                       | Default     |
| ----------------- | ------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ | ----------- |
| `alt`             | `alt`              | Alternative text for the illustration. Falls back to the selected error type label.      | `string`                                   | `undefined` |
| `description`     | `description`      | Description text for the error page. Uses the variant default when no value is provided. | `string`                                   | `undefined` |
| `headline`        | `headline`         | Headline text for the error page. Uses the variant default when no value is provided.    | `string`                                   | `undefined` |
| `illustrationUrl` | `illustration-url` | Custom illustration URL for the error page graphic.                                      | `string`                                   | `undefined` |
| `type`            | `type`             | Error page variant used to select the default content and image. Defaults to "403".      | `"403" \| "404" \| "503" \| "maintenance"` | `"403"`     |
